items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of copying settings from one business to another. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how this scenario is executed or what the expected outcomes are. The lack of specific details or results from the simulation leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this scenario.
